titleStmt.title: SII 25.270: original edition by M. D. Sampath
No. 270. (A.R. No. 270 of 1908.) KARIVAḶAMVANDANALLŪR, SANKARANAYINAR KOYIL TALUK, TIRUNELVELI DISTRICT.

summary.p: South wall of the central shrine in the Pālvaṇṇanāthasvāmi temple.
The details of date viz., Śaka 1324, regnal year 2+5, Paṅguni are not sufficient for verification.

It records the grant of 36 mā of land at Teṉkaraikuṟuchchi in Ārināḍu excluding the old dēvadāṉa lands of the deity by the king for the daily worship and food offerings to the deity Tirukkaḷādīchchuram-uḍaiyanāyanār of Karuvaranallūr in Ari-nāḍu. The gift was entrusted to the śrī-Rudra śrī-Mahēśvarañ-cheyvār of the above temple who undertook to maintain the worship from out of the income from lands by raising crops through tenants.

The same was ordered to be deducted from the accounts of the variyilār. Tachchaimēli-uḍaiyāṉ figures as a witness to the taxes collected from the village Karivaranallūr. This village is identical with Karivaḷamvandanallūr.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
tulyam .
svastiśrī śakābdam 1000 3 100 2 10 4l kojaṭila varmmarāṉa tribhuvaṉaccakravatti śrī kulacekaratevar śrīvāsu
devanallūril Eḻuntaruḷi Iruntu tiruvāymoḻintaruḷi tirukkaiviḷaiyāṭina tirumukattiṉpaṭi Āri nāṭṭukkaruvara na
llūril Uṭaiyār tirukaḷānticcuramuṭaiyanāyanār tirukkoyil śrī rūdra śrīmaheśvarañceyvārkaḷukku Ivvu
ṭaiyāṟku Amutupaṭi cāttuppaṭi nityanimantam muḷḷiṭṭa palavakaikkum Iraṇṭāvatiṉ Etir Añcāvatu paṅku ni mātam
82 mutalukku Iṉṉāyaṉār paḻantevatānam niṅkalāka Iṉṉāṭṭu teṉkarai kuṟucciil periya kuḷattiṉ kiḻ
vaṭaThe letter ‘ṭa’ is written below.kku maṭaippokiṟa Āṟāṅ kaṇṇāṟu mutaliṭu meṟku niṉṟum karaikkum taricukkum kkālukkuṅ kiḻakku taṭiyiraṇ
ṭu nilam ma ñ yiṉ � muṉṟu mā mukkāṇi mutalān kaṇṇāṟṟukku kiḻakkuk kāliṭai kiḻakku kālukkut teṟku taṭi 4 la ma
ñ muṉṟumā mukkāṇiyil kiḻakkaṭaiya taṭiyum 2 Araiye mākāṇiyum nikki tevatānam Āka Aṟāṅ kaṇṇāṟu 2 patiṉañcu
mā mukkāṇiyiṉ Araiye Araikkālum Eḻāṅkaṇṇāṟu meṟku niṉṟum kāṭu taricukkuk kālukkuṅk kiḻakku taṭi Oṉṟum A
raikkāṇi muntiriyiṉarai kāṇiyiṉ kāliṭai teṉkiḻakku kālukku vaṭakkuttaṭi Iraṇṭu 2 kāṇi muntirikaiyiṉ Āṟu mākkā
ṇi mutal Ikkaṇṇāṟṟu kiḻakku muḻikku nirnta kallukku meṟkku taṭi Iraṇṭu 2 kiḻkkāle Araikāl Uḷpaṭa Eḻāṅkaṇṇāṟu Āka
2 Irupatu mā Araikāṇi muntiri kaiyiṉ Eḻumāvaraiyum Āka 2 muppattu Āṟumāvum Iṉṉāḷ mutal tāṅkaḷ kaikkoṇṭu ta
ṅkaḷukku veṇṭum kuṭikku Aṭaittu payirceyvittuk koṇṭu kaṭamai viṉiyoka pala Upāti Uḷpaṭṭa vakaiyum ma
ṟṟum Eṟpeṟpaṭṭa samasta prāptikaḷum kū paṅkaḷ Iṉṉāḷ mutal kaiykkoṇṭu pūcaittāḻvaṟa naṭattu potum paṭi vari
yilār kaṇakkil kaḻittuk kuṭuttom Ituv Ippaṟṟilañvaṉaittoṇi vayalukkum vaṭakkum teṟkil yiluppait toppu
Oṉṟum maṇalūrp perum puttū
r vaḻi Āyattil Eḻu poti Oṉṟuk
kup paṇam Araikālum Aricip
potikku ø Orumā 1kāṇim 2 potikku � kma
m cevukkum Erutukkum ø pampiñ
cuppotikku ø Iraṇṭumā m campaip
potikku ø pacum Uppup potikku
ø Orumā m veṟṟilaip potikku ø Orumā 1kāṇi
m Āṭu Urupattukku ø pam miḷaku po
tikku ø 5m pākkuppotikku økha
namakku pattukkoṉṟu paṇam
koḷḷum vakaikku mitiyil pattukko
rumāvarai koḷḷum paṭiyum kaṟpi
ttuk kallilum cempilum ve
ṭṭittiruccūla sdhāpanam ceytu
koḷḷumpaṭiy karivaranallūriṟu
tta Iṟaiyum (1/2) nālum pāṟka taccai
meli Uṭaiyāṉ
Digital edition of SII 25.270 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
